improvements.prompt_change: Explicitly require running `pytest tests/` (without PYTHONPATH) in a clean shell as an acceptance gate.
improvements.rationale: Prevents hidden import-path dependencies and ensures CI-equivalent test invocation.

improvements.prompt_change: Require the agent to verify branch diff against main and ensure issue outputs are present as changed artifacts before code review.
improvements.rationale: Avoids review cycles where no issue-specific diff is available.

improvements.prompt_change: When tests import top-level modules, instruct agent to add/validate tests/conftest.py path bootstrapping if the project is not packaged.
improvements.rationale: Makes test collection deterministic across local and CI environments.
